title: coincya nevadensis
intro: Coincya nevadensis, also known as Coincya or Nevada lettuce, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coincya nevadensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can help protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
